features: 1. Premium Materials: Our shower caps are made of high-quality satin. Satin is smooth, soft, and extremely gentle on your gorgeous hair. The inner layer features waterproof PEVA material. It effectively keeps moisture at bay, ensuring your hair stays dry throughout your shower.

2. Versatile Use: These reusable shower caps are incredibly handy in various situations. Use them while bathing, showering, cooking, during a SPA session, or when doing home cleaning. Additionally, our shower caps are perfect for securing your hair when you're washing your face, applying a facial mask, putting on makeup, and more. They're an essential helper in your daily routine.

3. Ideal Size: Our waterproof shower cap has an outer diameter of approximately 11 inches (28 cm) and an inner diameter of around 5 inches (12.7 cm). This sizing ensures a better fit and a more comfortable user experience.

4. Perfect Fit with No Slips: Our Shower Cap stretch design for comfort. Each women shower cap features a high-quality elastic band with strong elasticity and durability, making our waterproof bathing caps suitable for most women's head sizes, and effectively secures the shower cap to prevent slipping.

5. What You Get: You will receive 2 sets shower caps which including: 2 waterproof shower caps + 2 satin hair scrunches. Enough for your daily uses: Water-resistant shower caps for keeping your hair dry when showering or bathing. We offer different color satin hair scrunches, whatever you wear, you can choose a beautiful color.
